purpose: Correct general pytest regressions reported after POST-H-022-A without changing product runtime behavior.
root_cause_summary: DocumentationSourceRegistry entries introduced by POST-H-022-A used classification values outside the registry schema enum.
CLI registry regression test did not include the enterprise declarative command group introduced by POST-H-022-A.
Historical POST-H-017/018/019 tests asserted exact mutable project_state values after the repo had advanced to POST-H-022-A.
Schema registry test did not include SCHEMA-DEVPL-ENTERPRISE-THREAT-MODEL-V1.
